parsed.fixed_xml:
<ITEM>
  <ANNOUNCEMENT>
    <TEXT>Herr Johann Heinrich Flick, Buchbinder an der Gerbergaße bey E. E. Zunfft zu Schneideren, thut hiemit allen denen Herren Liebhaberen zu wissen, die noch willens und auf diejenige Bibel zu präumeriren, welche</TEXT>
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Herr Johannes Amman</AUTHOR>
      <ROLE>Kupfferstecher</ROLE>
      <PLACE>Schaffhausen</PLACE>
      <FORMAT>Quarto</FORMAT>
      <DESCRIPTION>mit schönem grobem Druck und</DESCRIPTION>
      <VOLUME>180 Kupfferstichen</VOLUME>
      <NOTE>daß deren Praenumerations-Termin in nächstkünftigem Monath May zu Ende gehe, und so dann in dem Praenumerations-Preiß keine mehr zu haben seyen, wer also Lust hat dieses schöne und nutzliche Werck sich in solch extra wohlseilem Preiß anzuschaffen, beliebe sich bey Zeiten bey ihme anzumelden, und das Praenumerations-Geld einzusenden,</NOTE>
    </BIBL>
    <PRICING>
      <PRIZE>
        <TYPE>Schreib-Pappier</TYPE>
        <AMOUNT>fl. 1. 30. xr.</AMOUNT>
        <PAYMENT>
          <ADVANCE>1. fl.</ADVANCE>
          <BALANCE>30. xr.</BALANCE>
        </PAYMENT>
      </PRIZE>
      <PRIZE>
        <TYPE>sauber Druck-Pappier</TYPE>
        <AMOUNT>fl. 1. 12. xr.</AMOUNT>
        <PAYMENT>
          <ADVANCE>36. xr.</ADVANCE>
          <BALANCE>36. xr.</BALANCE>
        </PAYMENT>
      </PRIZE>
    </PRICING>
    <TEXT>und stellet er so dann seinen Herren Poänumeranten frey ihre Exemplaria gebunden oder ungebunden bey ihme zu beziehen. Die weiteren Umstände und schöne Disposition dieser Bibel, ist aus dem Prob-Bogen, so bey ihme zu haben, mit mehrerm zu sehen.</TEXT>
  </ANNOUNCEMENT>
</ITEM>

explanation.fix: Added root-level <ANNOUNCEMENT> tag to properly structure the content.
explanation.reason: The original XML lacked a clear hierarchical structure for the announcement text.

explanation.fix: Added <ROLE> tag for the author's role (Kupfferstecher).
explanation.reason: The role was embedded in the text without a proper XML tag.

explanation.fix: Added <DESCRIPTION> tag for the description of the Bible's format.
explanation.reason: The descriptive text was not encapsulated in a meaningful tag.

explanation.fix: Added <NOTE> tag for the note about the pre-order deadline.
explanation.reason: The note was part of the main text without a distinct tag.

explanation.fix: Added <PRICING> tag to encapsulate all pricing information.
explanation.reason: Pricing details were scattered and lacked a clear structure.

explanation.fix: Added <TYPE> tags for different paper types (Schreib-Pappier, sauber Druck-Pappier).
explanation.reason: The paper types were not distinctly tagged.

explanation.fix: Added <PAYMENT> tags to encapsulate advance and balance payment details.
explanation.reason: Payment details were not clearly structured.

explanation.fix: Fixed encoding issues (e.g., "�a7" to "ß", "�a6" to "ä", etc.).
explanation.reason: The original text had incorrect Unicode escape sequences.

explanation.fix: Added proper indentation and line breaks for readability.
explanation.reason: The original XML was compacted without clear structure.

explanation.fix: Corrected repeated <PRIZE> tags by restructuring them under <PRICING>.
explanation.reason: The repeated <PRIZE> tags were not logically grouped.

explanation.fix: Added <TEXT> tags to encapsulate narrative text sections.
explanation.reason: Narrative text was not distinctly separated from structured data.
Typographical errors were present in the original text.
